title: ActiveCampaign vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign vs Omnisend. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your business needs.
intro: ActiveCampaign and Omnisend are both powerful email and SMS marketing platforms, but they cater to different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels as an all-in-one CRM with advanced automation, while Omnisend specializes in ecommerce-focused omnichannel campaigns. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right tool for your marketing goals.
choose_a_if: You need advanced CRM features and lead scoring capabilities
Your business requires complex automation workflows and site tracking
You're a B2B company looking for an integrated sales and marketing platform
choose_b_if: You run an ecommerce store and want a specialized platform with product picker
You want to start for free and test before paying
You need omnichannel marketing with SMS, email, and push notifications together

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign is better for complex automation and CRM requirements, offering more advanced features at a comparable price. Omnisend is better for ecommerce businesses seeking an easy-to-use, multi-channel platform with a free tier. Both have strong ratings, so the choice comes down to your specific use case.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Omnisend?
faq.a: Omnisend is cheaper if you're just starting out, offering a free tier for up to 250 subscribers. Both platforms start at around $15-16/month for paid plans. If you need more subscribers immediately, Omnisend's freemium model provides better initial value, while ActiveCampaign may offer better long-term ROI for businesses needing advanced features.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms including ActiveCampaign support importing subscriber lists and basic campaign data. However, complex automation workflows and segmentation rules typically need to be recreated manually. It's recommended to plan your migration carefully and test in the new platform before fully transitioning your campaigns.
